name: Discord
description: Talk to this agent from Discord — one-click connect via Eden's shared Discord app, a slash command named after the agent, and signature-verified interactions via eve's discordChannel.
setup:
**Connect (recommended):** open the agent's **Deployment** tab and click **Connect Discord**. Pick your server and approve one authorization screen. Eden registers a `/<agent-name>` slash command and routes interactions to the agent automatically — use it as `/<agent-name> message: ...`.

Eden owns one shared Discord app per installation, so there is nothing to create in the Developer Portal and no secrets to copy: `DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID` and `DISCORD_PUBLIC_KEY` are provisioned for you at deploy, and the bot token stays on the control plane (interaction replies use the interaction token, so instances never need it).

**Self-host note (operators):** configure the shared Discord app once — set `EDEN_DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID`, `EDEN_DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN`, and `EDEN_DISCORD_PUBLIC_KEY` on the control plane, point the app's **Interactions Endpoint URL** at `<origin>/api/discord/interactions`, and add `<origin>/discord/callback` to its **OAuth2 Redirects**.

secrets.name: DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID
secrets.description: Discord application id of Eden's shared app — provisioned automatically at deploy from the installation's Discord app. Used for interaction follow-ups.

secrets.name: DISCORD_PUBLIC_KEY
secrets.description: Ed25519 public key of Eden's shared app for inbound interaction verification — provisioned automatically at deploy.
